name: SAIGAITON: OKUHONO NO TATSUMAKI (DISASTER RELEASE: MANY FLAMING TORNADOES)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Fuuton, Katon)

Rank: 12

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 28 | Successes: 4

Perform: 15 | Perform DC: 32

Components: C, H, E (See Text)

This highly advanced form of chakra manipulation requires the combined force of fire and wind to create devastating fire tornadoes that wreak havoc on those who become affected by them. In order to perform this technique, the user rolls 1d4+1 to determine how many tornadoes this technique will create. He then chooses a number of 5-foot squares equal to that number within the techni que's range for the tornadoes to reign down on. If a creature is caught in an affected square, it must succeed a Reflex save or else suffer 6d6 fire damage and 6d6 wind and become trapped in the vortex for the duration of the technique. If a creature becomes trapped, it takes an additional 2d6 fire damage and 1d6 slashing damage each round after the first. After the vortex ends, the target must succeed an additional Reflex save (DC 20) to avoid catching on fire, which if the creature fails, deals 2d6 fire damage per round for a number of rounds equal to half the duration of this technique.

Effect: Creates 1d4+1 tornados

Empower: The user may spend 4 points of chakra to create an additional fire tornado, up to 5 additional tornadoes.
